prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The National Travel Survey (NTS) primarily focuses on travel data from England, as the sample selection is drawn exclusively from English households. While travel behavior trends in Great Britain are monitored, specific survey sampling methods and protocols do not apply to Scotland, Wales, or Northern Ireland.
